allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; s=json.load\(open\('.claude/settings.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); l=json.load\(open\('.claude/settings.local.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('settings.json allow:', len\(s.get\('permissions',{}\).get\('allow',[]\)\)\); print\('settings.json hooks PreToolUse matchers:', len\(s.get\('hooks',{}\).get\('PreToolUse',[]\)\)\); first=s.get\('hooks',{}\).get\('PreToolUse',[]\)[0] if s.get\('hooks',{}\).get\('PreToolUse',[]\) else None; print\('PreToolUse first matcher:', first.get\('matcher'\) if first else None\); first_hook=\(first.get\('hooks',[{}]\)[0].get\('command',''\) if first else ''\); print\('first hook command tail:', first_hook[-40:]\); print\('settings.local.json allow:', len\(l.get\('permissions',{}\).get\('allow',[]\)\)\); print\('settings.local.json has hooks:', 'hooks' in l\); print\('settings.local.json has statusLine:', 'statusLine' in l\)")
Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys tabs = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for t in tabs: print\(t.get\('title',''\)[:50], '|', t.get\('url',''\)[:80]\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys try: data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) contexts = data.get\('contexts', {}\) for ctx_name, ctx in contexts.items\(\): mappings = ctx.get\('mappings', {}\).get\('dispatcherServlets', {}\) for sname, handlers in mappings.items\(\): for h in handlers: details = h.get\('details', {}\) req_map = details.get\('requestMappingConditions', {}\) patterns = req_map.get\('patterns', []\) methods = req_map.get\('methods', []\) print\(f\\"{','.join\(methods\) or 'ANY':6} {','.join\(patterns\)}\\"\) except Exception as e: raw = sys.stdin.read\(\) if not sys.stdin.closed else '' print\('파싱 실패:', e\) ")

PowerShell($wts = @\('hardcore-raman','elastic-fermi','great-curie','quirky-dewdney','friendly-kirch','relaxed-engelbart','happy-margulis','strange-meninsky','dazzling-nash','agitated-mendel','amazing-feynman'\); foreach \($w in $wts\) { $p = ".claude/worktrees/$w"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { Remove-Item $p -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FAIL $w" } else { Write-Output "OK $w" } } }; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem .claude/worktrees | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell($wts = @\('hardcore-raman','elastic-fermi','great-curie','quirky-dewdney','friendly-kirch','relaxed-engelbart','happy-margulis','strange-meninsky','dazzling-nash','agitated-mendel','amazing-feynman'\); foreach \($w in $wts\) { $p = ".git/worktrees/$w"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { Remove-Item $p -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Get-ChildItem .git/worktrees | Select-Object Name)
Bash(bash -c 'for i in {1..30}; do sleep 10; echo "tick $i"; done')
